-- 4 of 72 --

So the theme Leila & I will be moving everyone through is:
1) DAY 1 Alex & Leila: OUR WHY
2) DAY 1 Alex: Beliefs
3) DAY 1 Leila: A Culture of Performance
4) DAY 1 Leila & Alex: Partnerships
5) DAY 1 Alex: Weaponized Community
6) DAY 1: AWARD CEREMONY & FANCY PANTS DINNER
The other speakers I have invited are all amazing speakers who will provide
TONS of value to you and break up the hard core tactical conversations I tend to
have… :)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 72 --

With that, I believe there are only THREE things you
can get from an in-person event.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 72 --

Clarity
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 72 --

Clarity: is understanding what you are NOT going
to focus on and the ONE THING you need to do to
change your business.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 72 --

My biggest pet peeve…
“You know what you SHOULD DO?!”
-someone outside your business you just met with
no context.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 72 --

There will ALWAYS be 1000 things you CAN do
to improve your business.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 72 --

But your job is to determine...with the
RESOURCES you have available (time, team,
money)...
WHICH ONE ACTION will move your business
forward the MOST.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 72 --

Then disregard the rest until that item is DONE.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 72 --

The Big Domino...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 72 --

As an easy exercise...which of the following are you
struggling the most with:
Lead Gen
Lead Nurture
Sales
Fulfilment (Conversion)
Retention
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 72 --

If this ONE THING were fixed, and nothing else
was, would it fundamentally change how well your
business operates?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 72 --

Then why do anything else?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 72 --

When I “coach” high level
entrepreneurs, I only try to
identify the bottleneck/lever,
then ask why they aren’t
focusing on it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 72 --

That’s it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 72 --

And once you know what to
do, the other 2 “C”s come into
play...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 72 --

Clarity
Conviction
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 72 --

Conviction: believing you can achieve something
you have never achieved.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 72 --

Clarity
Conviction 	Community
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 72 --

Community: a group of like-minded individuals
with a common goal.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 72 --

These two are linked.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 72 --

“Proximity is Power”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 72 --

WHY?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 72 --

Because the
unbelievable becomes
believable.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 72 --

The single greatest gift of connection in a
community is BREAKING BELIEFS.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 72 --

You meet someone. They dont seem special.
Then you see they are doing 10x what you are
doing...then you BELIEVE it is possible.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 43 of 72 --

And so my ask for you NOW is to do one thing:	www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

And so my ask for you NOW is to do one thing:
(and most of you wont listen)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 45 of 72 --

And so my ask for you NOW is to do one thing:
(and most of you wont listen)
Meet NEW Gym Lords.
See what they are good at and learn from
THEM. Don’t clique.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 46 of 72 --

And so my ask for you NOW is to do one thing:
(and most of you wont listen)
Meet NEW Gym Lords.
See what they are good at and learn from
THEM. Don’t clique.
Say hello to old friends, but sit at tables with
people better than you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 47 of 72 --

Everyone here is better than someone else at
something.
Pocket your pride and LISTEN.
Take Notes.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 48 of 72 --

When Leila & I go to an event we know who we
are going to speak with and what we want from
them ahead of time.
That way, we can measure whether it was a
successful event.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 49 of 72 --

And the way to get someone to give you all their
“Secrets” is to tell them some of yours…
It’s called RECIPROCITY...and it works.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 50 of 72 --

Clarity tells you what you need to fix	www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 51 of 72 --

Clarity tells you what you need to fix
Conviction tells you that you can actually do it,
and keeps you persisting when you stumble.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 52 of 72 --

Clarity tells you what you need to fix
Conviction tells you that you can actually do it,
and keeps you persisting when you stumble.
Community help you along the way.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 53 of 72 --

One Precursor To Note:
Everytime I go to an event here’s how I take notes:
1) I write down ideas I have so I dont lose them
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 54 of 72 --

One Precursor To Note:
Everytime I go to an event here’s how I take notes:
1) I write down ideas I have so I dont lose them
2) I take an extra day after every event to gather my thoughts and let things
marinate
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 55 of 72 --

One Precursor To Note:
Everytime I go to an event here’s how I take notes:
1) I write down ideas I have so I dont lose them
2) I take an extra day after every event to gather my thoughts and let things
marinate
3) On the flight home or on this free day...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 56 of 72 --

a) Review All Noteswww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 57 of 72 --

b) Prioritize Important Items on NEW PAGE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 58 of 72 --

C) Draw an arrow and write down the
actions & estimated time to complete
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 59 of 72 --

D) Mark Calendar/Plan WHEN I Will Do Them
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 60 of 72 --

E) Disregard the restwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 61 of 72 --

At the end of the day, it’s not what you learn, it’s what
you DO that will change your business.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 62 of 72 --

People ask us how we moved so quickly...and the reason is
because we invest in INFORMATION & TAKE ACTION on
it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 63 of 72 --

And we focus on the FEW BIG things that matter, and
disregard the rest.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 64 of 72 --

How do you know which to focus on?
How do you know what to do once you see the problem?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 65 of 72 --

Normally this takes lots of TRIAL & ERROR
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 66 of 72 --

Normally this takes lots of TRIAL & ERROR
Which costs MONEY...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 67 of 72 --

Normally this takes lots of TRIAL & ERROR
Which costs MONEY…
and most importantly…
TIME
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 68 of 72 --

So this is how we intend to “fast track” your speed to gym
financial freedom...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 69 of 72 --

Information is the ONLY thing that can buy you TIME.
Info Helps
Avoid This
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 70 of 72 --

So our goal here is to decrease the time it takes you to get
from where you are to where you want to go…
Clarity
Conviction
Community
INFO & ACTION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
